title: Quote: drop concrete-roof surcharge; add KWP price + roof area
changes: Removed 'תוספת לגג בטון' from pricing logic — no longer added to quotes or charged
Removed concretePerKw input field from index.html settings
Added 'מחיר KWP' (price per kWp) line in customer-facing price breakdown
Added 'שטח הגג' (roof area) to customer-facing system info row and spec tables (v1 + v2)
author: Claude

title: Initial version baseline — unified versioning policy
changes: Initial version baseline established under unified versioning policy
Removed all legacy inconsistent version numbers (v1.1.0, v1.0.0, v2.0.0)
Added unified version display in bottom-right corner across all pages
Created version.json as single source of truth
Created changelog.json for version history tracking
Migrated historical changelog from CHANGELOG.md to changelog.json
author: Claude
notes: Prior history (pre-unified-versioning): v1.0.0 (2026-03-22) initial documented version with HubSpot tasks; v1.1.0 (2026-03-23) HubSpot sync without email fix. All reset to 1.00.00.00 under new policy.
